title: Field of Dreams Game 2026 Uniforms Unveiled
description: The Minnesota Twins and Philadelphia Phillies have revealed special uniforms for the 2026 event, according to sports news outlets.

sources.title: Twins, Phillies unveil special Field of Dreams game uniforms
Phils, Twins to sport retro uniforms in Field of Dreams Game
Bryce Harper, Phillies Unveil New Uniforms for MLB Field of Dreams Game vs. Twins in Trending Photos

sections.heading: Uniform Reveal
paragraphs: According to ESPN, the Minnesota Twins and Philadelphia Phillies have unveiled special uniforms for the Field of Dreams game in 2026.
MLB.com reports that the Phillies and Twins will sport retro uniforms during the Field of Dreams Game.

sections.heading: Team and Player Highlights
paragraphs: Bleacher Report indicates that Bryce Harper and the Phillies unveiled new uniforms for the MLB Field of Dreams Game versus the Twins.
The matchup between the Phillies and the Twins is highlighted in the trending photos reported by Bleacher Report.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: The term 'field of dreams game 2026' has a search volume lower bound of 500 in the US region according to the trend report.
Google Trends data reflects the popularity of search queries over time relative to total search volume.

faq.q: Which teams are playing in the 2026 Field of Dreams Game?
faq.a: According to Bleacher Report, the Philadelphia Phillies will play against the Minnesota Twins.

faq.q: kind of uniforms will be worn at the event?
faq.a: MLB.com states that the Phillies and Twins will sport retro uniforms for the game.
